author: dashboard-bootstrap
content: Root cause: role-aware configure_signing went driver→disable when user.signingkey wasn't set in main repo. Test_configure_signing_with_key asserts gpg.format=ssh with only agent.json keys. Fix: after driver_signing_key() miss, fall back to agent.ssh_key_path if present. Semantics still role-aware — driver key wins when configured — but operators without user.signingkey don't get unsigned hub commits.
